title: Splunk Log Analysis
headline: Suspicious login spikes — SSH brute force
query:
index=main sourcetype="linux_secure" action="failure" user="root"
| stats count by src_ip
| where count > 50
| sort - count
recruiterHint: Splunk hunt: correlate failed root logins, then widen with toolbox snippet 1 or hunt the successful break-in (snippet 3).

rows.data: Failed password for root from 192.168.1.105 port 49122 ssh2
Failed password for root from 192.168.1.105 port 49122 ssh2
Accepted password for root from 192.168.1.105 port 49122 ssh2
pam_unix(sshd:session): session opened for user root by (uid=0)
Failed password for invalid user admin from 10.0.0.44 port 51200 ssh2

toolboxQueries: | stats count by src_ip | sort - count

title: Wireshark Packet Sniffing
headline: DNS beaconing — unusual query volume
environmentLabel: Zeek DNS logs · Network SIEM index
statusLabel: Curated exercise (DNS queries from PCAP export)
query:
index=network sourcetype=dns update-check.example
| stats count by src_ip, query
| where count > 100
| sort - count
recruiterHint: Wireshark-style DNS investigation: filter the beacon domain (default query), then compare with benign traffic (toolbox 1) or the SIEM threshold alert (toolbox 3).

rows.data: Frame 1842 | UDP 52441 → 53 | QRY A? a7f3b2.update-check.example | Client 203.0.113.88 — NOERROR
Frame 1844 | UDP 52441 → 53 | QRY A? 9c1d4e.update-check.example | Client 203.0.113.88 — NOERROR
Frame 1846 | UDP 53 → 52441 | ANSWER A 203.0.113.88 | TTL 300 for a7f3b2.update-check.example
Frame 1850 | UDP 44102 → 53 | QRY A? www.google.com | Client 10.0.0.12 — NOERROR

toolboxQueries: | stats count by src_ip | sort - count

title: Metasploit Environments
headline: Web shell upload attempt — WAF + access logs
query:
index=web sourcetype=access_log src_ip=198.51.100.17
| stats count by src_ip, uri
| sort - count
recruiterHint: AppSec / pentest lab: default query isolates the staging host. Use toolbox 1 for blocks only, or toolbox 3 for the WAF webshell rule hit.

rows.data: BLOCK 198.51.100.17 POST /upload.php — rule: webshell_signature — body matched shell.php

toolboxQueries: | stats count by src_ip | sort - count
